name: Endpoint Configuration Drift Detection
description: Detects and remediates endpoint configuration drift by comparing current settings against the organization's security baseline. When drift is detected (disabled firewall, weakened audit policy, modified registry keys), the playbook categorizes the deviation and assesses severity. Critical deviations trigger automated remediation via the endpoint agent and SOC notification. Minor drift is logged for the next compliance review cycle.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: CrowdStrike Falcon
required_integrations.reason: Push remediation scripts to restore endpoint configuration to baseline

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create tracking tickets for configuration drift remediation

config.description: Triggers when an endpoint configuration deviates from the security baseline

config.code:
drifted_settings = alert.get('drifted_settings', [])
critical_settings = ['windows_firewall', 'antivirus_status', 'audit_policy', 'uac_level', 'secure_boot']
critical_drift = [s for s in drifted_settings if s.get('setting_name', '') in critical_settings]
minor_drift = [s for s in drifted_settings if s.get('setting_name', '') not in critical_settings]
result = {'total_drift': len(drifted_settings), 'critical_count': len(critical_drift), 'minor_count': len(minor_drift), 'critical_settings': [s.get('setting_name') for s in critical_drift], 'has_critical': len(critical_drift) > 0}
config.description: Categorize drifted settings into critical (security-impacting) and minor deviations
Routes based on whether any critical security settings have drifted from baseline
Push remediation script to restore critical security settings to baseline values

parameters.title: Config Drift Remediated — {{trigger_1.alert.hostname}}

config.description: Create a ticket to track the remediation and investigate the root cause of drift
Notify the SOC about the critical configuration drift and remediation actions

parameters.note: Minor configuration drift detected on {{trigger_1.alert.hostname}}. {{code_1.minor_count}} non-critical settings deviated from baseline. Deferred to next compliance review cycle.

config.description: Log minor drift for the next scheduled compliance review cycle
Endpoint configuration drift detection workflow complete
